title: Comment from Family Caregiver Alliance, HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
comment_text:
See Submitted on behalf of Family Caregiver Alliance (FCA) and CareNav Health.
Re: Health Data, Technology, and Interoperability: ASTP/ONC Deregulatory Actions to Unleash Prosperity (HTI-5), Docket HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001

The attached comment letter addresses four areas of the proposed rule: (1) FHIR-first certification reset with caregiver data element inclusion; (2) AI model card transparency requirements for vulnerable populations; (3) information blocking reforms with caregiver coordination protections; and (4) RFI response on AI policy, patient safety, and reimbursement.

See attached file.
